data.html:
/*    /index.html   200

# Redirect old /static/ paths to new paths (for cache compatibility)
/static/js/*    /js/:splat   301
/static/libs/*    /libs/:splat   301
/static/css/*    /css/:splat   301
/static/*.html    /:splat.html   301
/static/*.json    /:splat.json   301
/static/*.png    /:splat.png   301
/static/*.ico    /:splat.ico   301
